name: Dark End Evaporation Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇と消滅の竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダークエンドイヴァポレイション・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
You can banish 1 Level 8 Dragon monster from your Extra Deck; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field.
● Target 1 other Attack Position monster on the field; make this card lose exactly 500 ATK/DEF, and if you do, destroy that monster.
You can only use each effect of "Dark End Evaporation Dragon" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
mst: Destroys face-up Attack Position Monster Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from Extra Deck for cost
